== Abstract

This document describes the Holy Hand Grenade of Antioch,
a sacred artifact used in the defense against killer rabbits.

== Introduction

The Holy Hand Grenade of Antioch is a sacred relic.
Its use requires careful preparation and counting to three.

== Conventions

The key words "MUST", "MUST NOT", "REQUIRED", "SHALL", "SHALL NOT",
"SHOULD", "SHOULD NOT", "RECOMMENDED", "MAY", and "OPTIONAL" in this
document are to be interpreted as described in RFC 2119.

== Supported Features

The Holy Hand Grenade supports the following features:

* Counting to three
* Lobbing
* Anti-rabbit defense

== Security Considerations

Improper use of the Holy Hand Grenade may result in self-inflicted damage.
Users MUST count to three before lobbing.

== IANA Considerations

This document has no IANA actions.

== Acknowledgements

The authors acknowledge the contributions of the Knights of the Round Table.
